svg.title: Agent system architecture: ERC-8004, A2A, and x402
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture. Top: client agent and server agent each containing an agent runtime, A2A interface, x402 interface, and wallet, connected by A2A. Middle: offchain services including the agent registration file storage (referenced by ERC-8004 Identity via tokenURI) and the x402 facilitator. Bottom: onchain layer with ERC-8004 Identity, Reputation, and Validation registries plus the USDC contract on Base. Arrows show the server's x402 paywall calling the facilitator, which settles via EIP-3009 against USDC.
